economic_notes: Z'Gamok Enterprises LP and Z'Gamok Construction LP engaged in contracted services for mining, ore hauling, snow removal and custodial services. Sagamok Development Corporation and Ritchie Falls Resort (2344827 Ontario Inc.) also consolidated.
notes: Two GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: Z'Gamok Enterprises LP and Z'Gamok Construction LP. Two entities fully consolidated: Sagamok Development Corporation and 2344827 Ontario Inc. (Ritchie Falls Resort). Current liabilities estimated as bank indebtedness plus accounts payable and accrued liabilities (162035 + 1853031). Housing expenses combined from Community Housing (1526722) and Housing Renovations (532126) and Housing Administration (447988) and On-Reserve Housing (120299) subtotals. No remuneration schedule visible in provided pages. OSR includes Other revenue and Share of earnings from First Nation enterprises.
